manageProperties.title: Gestionar propiedades
manageProperties.subtitle: Vea y elimine las propiedades de su cuenta.
manageProperties.confirm.title: ¿Eliminar propiedad?
manageProperties.confirm.body: ¿Seguro que desea eliminar {name}? Esto eliminará permanentemente todas las habitaciones, tarifas, reservas y conexiones de canal asociadas a esta propiedad.
manageProperties.confirm.bookingsWarning: Esta propiedad tiene {count} reserva(s) próxima(s). Eliminarla no cancelará ni reembolsará automáticamente esas reservas. Debe gestionarlas manualmente antes de eliminar.
manageProperties.confirm.channelsWarning: Esta propiedad está conectada a {count} canal(es). Eliminarla desconectará todas las integraciones de canal. Es posible que deba eliminar manualmente la conexión en el lado de la OTA.
manageProperties.confirmName.title: Escriba el nombre de la propiedad para confirmar

manageProperties.confirmName.placeholder: Escriba el nombre de la propiedad
manageProperties.toast.error: No se pudo eliminar la propiedad. Inténtelo de nuevo.

settings.billing.providerVayadaDesc: We handle everything. No setup needed.
settings.billing.providerStripeDesc: Your own Stripe account. Direct payouts.
settings.billing.vayadaNoSetupDesc: vayada processes card payments on your behalf. Guest payments are collected securely and payouts are sent to your bank account on file.
settings.billing.accountHolderPlaceholde: Full name as on bank account
settings.billing.useIbanHelp: Use IBAN if your bank is in Europe or another IBAN country.
settings.billing.usePlainNumberHelp: Use a plain account number for banks without IBAN (e.g. Indonesia, US).
settings.billing.stripeBlurb: Secure payments processed by Stripe. Payouts go directly to your bank account.

settings.totp.title: Two-factor authentication
settings.totp.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account with an authenticator app.
settings.totp.scanInstructions: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.) and scan the link below, or enter the secret key manually.
settings.totp.confirmLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to confirm setup
settings.totp.recoveryWarning: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator.
settings.totp.regenInstructions: Enter your current 6-digit TOTP code to generate new recovery codes. Your old codes will be invalidated.
settings.totp.errorSetup: Failed to start 2FA setup. Please try again.
settings.totp.errorRegen: Invalid code. Recovery codes not changed.
